_readme: Offset database for SM64 star timer collections. Structure: { category: { stage: OffsetEntry[] } }. Each entry represents one specific routing choice for that stage in that category. lssName is the exact segment name as it appears in the .lss file. offsetSeconds is the fixed overhead NOT captured by the star timer (transitions, loading zones, door animations, movement between stars). label distinguishes entries within the same stage/category. Fill in offsetSeconds (null = not yet measured).
